_doc: Per-residue topology for the 5 RNA token classes (A, G, C, U, N). Extracted from ~/.boltz/mols/<CCD>.pkl via Boltz's const module. Same shape as residue_topology_protein.json. backbone_atom_idx is indexed against nucleic_backbone_atom_names (12 entries: P, OP1, OP2, O5', C5', C4', O4', C3', O3', C2', O2', C1'), which align with atom_backbone_feat channels 5..16. center/disto atom is C1'.
